clue_chain_pattern.description: Physical evidence of the act → suspect alibi that seemed solid → third-party observation collapses the alibi.

stages.prompt: Physical evidence of the act on the victim (fibre, mark, imprint) narrows the timing window.
A suspect gives a public alibi covering the timing window that appears to have witnesses.
A found object (ticket stub, receipt, phone log, key card) places the suspect back in the room within the window.

steps.prompt: Vesper names the timing window and the act.
For each player, name the clue they almost caught.
Vesper credits the culprit's best deception move.
One small line naming the object that broke the alibi.
